creator: jhicks@glenatl.glenayre.com
text:
ETH Oberon V4

Niklaus Wirth's Oberon System V4

This seems to run fine on FreeBSD under Linux Emulation (lightly tested)

We plan to use this port to support Lola/Trianus/Hades under FreeBSD.

For more information see:
	http://www.oberon.ethz.ch/
	http://www.lola.ethz.ch/

===========================================================
Jerry Hicks
jhicks@glenatl.glenayre.com                 July 13, 1998
